seo.title: Quiet Moth Artz | Creative Consultant, Website Design, Graphic Design & Hooks
seo.description: Quiet Moth Artz helps artists, creators, and small brands with websites, graphic design, logos, flyers, custom apparel concepts, songwriting hooks, and creative direction.

hero.headline: Creative websites, graphics, hooks, and brand systems for artists, entrepreneurs, and small businesses.
hero.subheadline: Quiet Moth Artz helps creators and brands look professional, promote better, and turn ideas into polished digital experiences - from websites and flyers to songwriting and creative consulting.

about.copy: Quiet Moth Artz brings design, writing, music, and systems together so your project feels complete from the first impression to the final call to action.

hookLabPromo.title: Try the Quiet Moth Hook Lab
hookLabPromo.text: Generate a free 4-bar hook preview, then contact me for a full custom 8-bar chorus or full song idea.
hookLabPromo.qrText: Open the standalone app in your phone browser, then add it to your home screen.
hookLabPromo.browserLink: Open Hook Lab in New Tab

blog.seoTitle: Creative Notes | Quiet Moth Artz Blog
blog.seoDescription: Creative notes from Quiet Moth Artz on websites, graphic design, songwriting hooks, brand identity, and creative systems for artists, entrepreneurs, and small businesses.
blog.headline: Ideas, design tips, hooks, and creative strategy for independent creators.
blog.subtitle: Quiet Moth Artz shares practical notes on websites, graphic design, songwriting, branding, and creative systems to help artists and small brands look more professional and promote with confidence.

featured.title: Building the Quiet Moth Hook Lab
featured.text: A look at how Quiet Moth Artz is turning songwriting support into a standalone creative tool for artists and brands.

cards.title: Why Every Artist Needs a Clean Website
cards.excerpt: A strong website gives artists a home base where fans, clients, and collaborators can understand the brand, see the work, and make contact without getting lost on social media.

cards.title: What Makes a Flyer Look Professional?
cards.excerpt: A strong flyer needs clear hierarchy, bold visuals, readable details, and a design that makes the event or offer feel worth paying attention to.

cards.title: How to Turn a Rough Idea Into a Hook
cards.excerpt: A good hook starts with a clear emotion, a memorable phrase, and a rhythm that makes people want to repeat it after hearing it once.

cards.title: Logo, Colors, and Voice: The Basics of Brand Identity
cards.excerpt: A brand feels more official when the logo, colors, visuals, and message all move in the same direction.

cards.title: Using Creative Systems to Save Time
cards.excerpt: Automated creative workflows can help creators organize ideas, generate drafts, plan visuals, and move faster without losing their personal style.

cards.title: Building the Quiet Moth Hook Lab
cards.excerpt: The Hook Lab started as a simple generator and is evolving into a standalone app for creating quick 4-bar hook previews from any idea.
